subject: Jan 19th, 2026
fact: The session notes are dated Jan 19th, 2026.
source_quote: Date: Jan 19th, 2026

subject: Maram il Vass
fact: Maram il Vass is a yugoloth who has entered into a binding contract with the party.
source_quote: You have entered into a binding contract with the yugoloth Maram il Vass

subject: Lexicon of Oaths
fact: The Lexicon of Oaths is a tome of great significance currently held by Vraxen.
source_quote: retrieve the Lexicon of Oaths, a tome of great significance currently held by his rival, Vraxen

subject: hourglass
fact: Maram provided an hourglass representing the exact time remaining to secure the book.
source_quote: Maram has provided an hourglass representing the exact time remaining to secure the book

subject: Vraxen
fact: Vraxen is a yugoloth rival of Maram il Vass who possesses the Lexicon of Oaths.
source_quote: currently held by his rival, Vraxen

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur learned he stole the Watcher's Eye Brooch instead of a simple trinket.
source_quote: Felkur has finally learned the truth of his past—he did not steal a simple trinket, but the Watcher's Eye Brooch

subject: Watcher's Eye Brooch
fact: The Watcher's Eye Brooch is a symbol of power that allowed Felkur to accidentally evade powerful mages.
source_quote: the Watcher's Eye Brooch, a symbol of power that allowed him to accidentally evade the most powerful mages in Mulmaster

subject: Sporedome
fact: The party returned to the drow encampment at Sporedome.
source_quote: Upon returning to the drow encampment at Sporedome

subject: Solom Ned'razak
fact: Solom Ned'razak is the ruler of Szith Morcane who presented a task to the party.
source_quote: you reunited with Solom Ned'razak, the ruler of Szith Morcane, who has presented a task

subject: demonic taint purge ritual
fact: Solom requires the blood of a living fire giant infused with fiendish essence to purge the demonic taint.
source_quote: Solom requires the blood of a living fire giant that has been infused with fiendish essence

subject: Graz'zt
fact: Graz'zt supports the demon-blooded pests that Solom views as a threat.
source_quote: survival against the "demon-blooded pests" supported by Graz'zt

subject: Xaven Tanor'this
fact: Xaven Tanor'this is Solom's collaborator who knows the secret route to Maerimydra.
source_quote: secret route known only to Solom and his collaborator, Xaven Tanor'this

subject: Black Ember Outpost
fact: The party must travel to the Black Ember Outpost, a fire giant stronghold.
source_quote: travel to the Black Ember Outpost, a fire giant stronghold

subject: Pathway of the Shadows
fact: The Pathway of the Shadows is a tunnel that leads directly into the Shattered Tower.
source_quote: The tunnel, known as the Pathway of the Shadows, leads directly into the Shattered Tower

subject: Shattered Tower
fact: The Shattered Tower is Solom's former center of study inside Maerimydra.
source_quote: inside Maerimydra (Solom's former center of study)

subject: The Spire of Inevitable Reckoning
fact: The Spire of Inevitable Reckoning is a basalt tower with a green-glowing teleportation circle at its apex.
source_quote: The Spire of Inevitable Reckoning, a basalt tower with a green-glowing teleportation circle at its apex

subject: Maram il Vass
fact: Maram il Vass questions Felkur about what he has done.
source_quote: "Do you have any idea, Felkur, what you've done?"

subject: Solom Ned'razak
fact: Solom Ned'razak describes the location as a damp, fungal purgatory.
source_quote: And yet, here I stand, in this damp, fungal purgatory

subject: Daein
fact: Solom explains what a portable hole is to Daein.
source_quote: Solom explains what a portable hole is to Daein

subject: Solom Ned'razak
fact: Solom Ned'razak introduces himself as archwizard and ruler of Szith Morcane.
source_quote: "I am Solom Ned'razak, archwizard and ruler of Szith Morcane

subject: Xaven Tanor'this
fact: Solom thanks the party for recovering Xaven Tanor'this from the palace of Maram il Vass.
source_quote: Thank you for recovering Xaven Tanor'this from the palace of Maram il Vass

subject: Solom Ned'razak
fact: Solom states that every demon-blooded pest is going to pay for what they did.
source_quote: every demon-blooded pest is going to pay for what they did

subject: Brotherhood of Cloaks
fact: The Brotherhood of Cloaks has spent thousands of gold pieces on divination rituals to find Felkur.
source_quote: The Brotherhood of Cloaks has spent thousands of gold pieces on divination rituals

subject: High Inquisitors
fact: The Brotherhood of Cloaks executed three High Inquisitors for failing to find the infiltrator.
source_quote: They've executed three High Inquisitors for 'failing' to find a master infiltrator

subject: Red Guard
fact: Felkur was previously chasing the Red Guard through the mud.
source_quote: Chasing the Red Guard through the mud

subject: Hillsfar
fact: Felkur saved Hillsfar from Graz'zt.
source_quote: Saving Hillsfar from Graz'zt

subject: Moonsea
fact: Felkur became a surgical strike against the security of the Moonsea.
source_quote: surgical strike against the security of the Moonsea

subject: Watcher's Eye Brooch
fact: The Watcher's Eye Brooch was sold by Felkur for forty pieces of silver.
source_quote: protect a 'bauble' you sold for forty pieces of silver

subject: Astral Plane
fact: The Brotherhood of Cloaks scoured the Astral Plane to find Felkur.
source_quote: They've scoured the Astral Plane

subject: Mask
fact: The Brotherhood of Cloaks calculated the infiltrator must be a chosen of Mask.
source_quote: chosen of Mask

subject: Xaven Tanor'this
fact: Xaven Tanor'this hurries the characters to the encampment at Sporedome.
source_quote: Xaven Tanor'this hurries the characters to the encampment

subject: Solom Ned'razak
fact: Solom Ned'razak wears a fresh set of finely crafted purple robes trimmed with silver.
source_quote: wearing a fresh set of finely crafted purple robes trimmed with silver

subject: Solom Ned'razak
fact: Solom and Xaven head to a large tent to do research.
source_quote: Solom and Xaven head to a large tent to do research

subject: Sporedome stay
fact: The party spends two days in Sporedome.
source_quote: The party spends two days in Sporedome

subject: Solom Ned'razak
fact: Solom becomes furious when the party interrupts his research.
source_quote: he's furious

subject: Solom Ned'razak
fact: Solom rejects the party's offer to join them, stating he is indispensable.
source_quote: He rejects their offer, explaining that he's indispensable to survival

subject: mind protecting mushrooms
fact: The party goes hunting for the mind protecting mushrooms they found previously.
source_quote: the party goes after the mind protecting mushrooms that they found last time in Sporedome

subject: Daein
fact: Daein complains that the need for a store has gone now that they are heroes of Hillsfar.
source_quote: Daein complains that now that they are heroes of Hillsfar, the need for a store has gone

subject: Xaven
fact: Xaven trails behind Solom and wrings his hands nervously.
source_quote: Behind him trails Xaven, nervous judging by the number of times he wrings his hands

subject: map of Maerimydra
fact: Solom provides the characters a slightly outdated map of Maerimydra.
source_quote: Solom provides the characters a map of Maerimydra- -albeit slightly outdated

subject: Hledh
fact: Hledh is a powerful fiendish giantess who commands the heavy guards at Maerimydra.
source_quote: their leader, a powerful fiendish giantess named Hledh, keeps the gates heavily guarded

subject: Lolth
fact: The secret tunnel was built to avoid the sight of the Lolth-worshipping matron mothers.
source_quote: beyond the sight of the Lolth-worshipping matron mothers

subject: Kurgoth Hellspawn
fact: Kurgoth Hellspawn and the fire giants demolished the Shattered Tower over a century ago.
source_quote: Kurgoth Hellspawn and the fire giants demolished the Shattered Tower

subject: breathing apparatus
fact: The party proposes adding a breathing apparatus to the portable hole.
source_quote: add a breathing apparatus to the portable hole

subject: portable hole
fact: The party proposes stuffing the giant into a portable hole.
source_quote: stuff in a portable hole

subject: Bags of Holding
fact: Ned'razak explains the difference between Bags of Holding and Portable Holes.
source_quote: The difference between Bags of Holding and Portable Holes according to Ned'razak

subject: Sporedome encampment
fact: The tunnel opens into a vast cavern with a fungal forest and a large lake.
source_quote: The tunnel opens up into a vast cavern... A great fungal forest spreads out on the ground... dim waters of a large lake

subject: myconids
fact: A large colony of myconids resides in the fungal forest at Sporedome.
source_quote: large colony of myconids, though the shy creatures keep their distance

subject: drow elves
fact: Several dozen drow elves mill around the tents at the Sporedome encampment.
source_quote: around which mill several dozen drow elves

subject: Black Ember Outpost
fact: The entrance to the secret passageway is in a cave under the Black Ember Outpost.
source_quote: In an cave under the outpost is a lake and the entrance to the secret passageway

subject: Pathway of the Shadows
fact: The Pathway of the Shadows was built to leave the Shattered Tower undetected from the clerics of Lolth.
source_quote: built to leave the Shattered Tower and Maerimydra undetected from the clerics of Lolth

subject: The Spire of Inevitable Reckoning
fact: The Spire of Inevitable Reckoning is a tower of sheer basalt with a glowing green room at the top.
source_quote: A tower of sheer basalt that at the top had a glowing green room

subject: Watcher's eye brooch
fact: The brooch is attuned to the defensive wards of the Tower of the Blades.
source_quote: The brooch is attuned to the defensive wards of the Tower of the Blades

subject: Tower of the Blades
fact: The Tower of the Blades is the seat of government in Mulmaster.
source_quote: the Tower of the Blades, the seat of government in Mulmaster

subject: Timepiece of Maram il Vass
fact: The Timepiece of Maram il Vass is an hourglass representing the time to secure the Lexicon of Oaths.
source_quote: An hourglass that represents the total time available to secure the Lexicon of Oaths

subject: Vraxen
fact: Vraxen is a yugoloth in Maerimydra managing Graz'zt's deal with the Fire Giants.
source_quote: Yugoloth in Maerimydra who is managing Graz'zt's deal with the Fire Giants

subject: Solom Ned'razak
fact: Solom Ned'razak is a powerful drow wizard who rules Szith Morcane.
source_quote: Solom is a powerful drow wizard who rules Szith Morcane

subject: Xaven Tanor'this
fact: Xaven Tanor'this is a drow alchemist and long-time collaborator of Solom.
source_quote: A drow alchemist that was saved from Maram il Vass, and a long time collaborator of Solom's

subject: antidote
fact: Xaven's knowledge is key to creating an antidote to the demonic infused Fire Giant blood.
source_quote: Xaven knowledge is key to create an antidote to the demonic infused Fire Giant blood
